creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freshports.org/sysutils/fusefs-smbnetfs/#message>

fusefs.ko    should be more simply:    fusefs

Also, this hint will add value: 

# sysrc kld_list+=fusefs

Thank you

----

Ref: bug 263782, fusefs(5) <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=fusefs&sektion=5&manpath=FreeBSD>, and sysrc(8) <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=sysrc&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD>.
